suggestions.label: What is an AI agent?
suggestions.text: Explain what an AI agent is, how it differs from a simple LLM chatbot, and what the core components are.

suggestions.label: ReAct pattern
suggestions.text: Explain the ReAct (Reasoning + Acting) pattern and how it enables agents to think step-by-step before taking actions.

suggestions.label: Tools and function calling
suggestions.text: How do AI agents use tools? Explain function calling, tool schemas, and how an agent decides which tool to use.

suggestions.label: Agent memory
suggestions.text: Explain the different types of memory in AI agents: short-term, long-term, episodic, and semantic memory.

suggestions.label: RAG explained
suggestions.text: Explain Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) — what it is, why it matters, and how to build a basic RAG pipeline.

suggestions.label: LangChain basics
suggestions.text: Give me an introduction to LangChain. What are chains, agents, and tools in the LangChain framework?

suggestions.label: LangGraph
suggestions.text: What is LangGraph and how does it extend LangChain for building stateful, multi-step agent workflows?

suggestions.label: LlamaIndex
suggestions.text: Explain LlamaIndex — what it does, how it differs from LangChain, and when to use it for RAG pipelines.

suggestions.label: Multi-agent systems
suggestions.text: What are multi-agent systems? Explain how multiple agents can collaborate, delegate tasks, and share memory.

suggestions.label: Prompt engineering
suggestions.text: What prompt engineering techniques are most important for building reliable AI agents?

suggestions.label: Vector databases
suggestions.text: Explain vector databases and embeddings — how they work and which ones to use for RAG (Chroma, Pinecone, Weaviate).

suggestions.label: Agent evaluation
suggestions.text: How do I evaluate the performance of an AI agent? What metrics and tools should I use?

suggestions.label: Agent failure modes
suggestions.text: What are the common failure modes of AI agents — hallucination, infinite loops, tool misuse — and how do I prevent them?

suggestions.label: Planning and reasoning
suggestions.text: Explain planning strategies for AI agents: Chain-of-Thought, Tree of Thoughts, and Plan-and-Execute.

suggestions.label: Practice
suggestions.text: Give me a hands-on AI agent coding challenge to build.
